objectives: Describe the stages of mitosis: prophase, metaphase, anaphase, telophase
Explain the role of the spindle apparatus in chromosome segregation
Distinguish mitosis from meiosis in terms of purpose and outcome
Identify checkpoints in the cell cycle and their significance

required_claims.statement: Mitosis produces two genetically identical diploid daughter cells
The spindle apparatus is composed of microtubules that attach to kinetochores on chromosomes
